title: Upper and lower bounds for normal derivatives of spectral clusters of   Dirichlet Laplacian
comment:
14 pages, Rewrite section 6 (the appendix) and correct a mistake in
  section 6
summary:
In this paper, we prove the upper and lower bounds for normal derivatives of
spectral clusters $u=\chi_{\lambda}^s f$ of Dirichlet Laplacian $\Delta_M$,
$$c_s \lambda\|u\|_{L^2(M)} \leq \| \partial_{\nu}u \|_{L^2(\partial M)} \leq
C_s \lambda \|u\|_{L^2(M)} $$ where the upper bound is true for any Riemannian
manifold, and the lower bound is true for some small $0<s<s_M$, where $s_M$
depends on the manifold only, provided that $M$ has no trapped geodesics (see
Theorem \ref{Thm3} for a precise statement), which generalizes the early
results for single eigenfunctions by Hassell and Tao.

title: On the gradient estimate of Cheng and Yau
comment: Will appear in Proc. Amer. Math. Soc
summary:
We improve the well known local gradient estimate of Cheng and Yau in the
case when Ricci curvature has a negative lower bound.
